primary_metric: Phase 0 detects roadmap items + state.json::tasks already shipped against current state BEFORE scheduling them as new work
success_metrics: scripts/phase-0-reality-check.py runs in <5s for any feature's state.json::tasks list (T1, measured via time)
Script emits structured advisory findings to stdout + writes .claude/shared/phase-0-reality-check.json (T1)
Phase 0.1 step added to /pm-workflow SKILL.md is auto-invoked after Phase 0.0 preflight (T1, encoded in SKILL.md)
At least 1 drift case caught in the next 90 days by the new check (T2, narrative — counts the drift-pattern instances I documented today as the calibration baseline)
kill_criteria: Script wall-clock >10s — operators will start skipping the step
False-positive rate >20% during 14-day calibration window — operators tune out the advisories
Step never catches a real drift case in the next 90 days — the discipline is not load-bearing; demote
kill_criteria_resolution: K1 (wall-clock) measured at 0.09s on a 14-task feature; well under 10s threshold. K2 + K3 require 14-90d operation to evaluate.
scope_summary:
Add Phase 0.1 sub-step `scripts/phase-0-reality-check.py` invoked after the unified preflight. For a given feature, reads state.json::tasks and cross-checks each pending task against recent (≤30d) git history + recent merged PR titles + recent feature.log.json events to surface 'this task may already be done' advisories. Output: stdout summary + .claude/shared/phase-0-reality-check.json. Wire into /pm-workflow SKILL.md as Phase 0.1.

Motivation: I documented 5 confirmed instances of post-squash-merge state-drift this week alone (C5 → D1 → C2/C3/C5/C6 batch → trend-alerts-hrv → today's F16/F17 closures). F2 is the mechanical defense against this class. Out of scope: cross-repo task tracking (Linear-only), auto-flipping tasks to done (requires operator confirmation), historical backfill (forward-only).

tasks.description: Write scripts/phase-0-reality-check.py — takes --feature <name>, reads state.json::tasks, checks each pending task against recent git log + merged PRs + Tier 2.2 log events
Unit tests at scripts/tests/test_phase_0_reality_check.py — empty tasks, all-done, all-pending, mixed; git log mock; merged-PR mock; log-event mock
Add Phase 0.1 section to .claude/skills/pm-workflow/SKILL.md right after Phase 0.0
Make target `make phase-0-reality-check FEATURE=<name>` invoking the script
Dev-guide v7.9.1 row updated with F2
Source case study + fitme-story showcase MDX slot 46

implementation.notes: F2 is workflow-only (no gate code, no advisory window). Per infra-master-plan §3.6.3 + post-v7-9-candidate-plan F-9: 'F2 + F6 are workflow/doc changes (single-commit reversible) and skip B–C; ship directly with verify-local validation.' Skipping Phase 0+1+2 since the spec is concrete + single-script scope.
